The Proposal: -
The above mentioned Reference No. Government by Decision of the Government at 2nd and 3rd
The policy of deputation has been announced and as per it various departments / departments of the state government.
Subordinate Boards, posts in the Corporation as well as the Semi-Government Office (Municipal /
Municipal Corporation), offices under other State Government or Central Government /
Posts in Corporations / Companies, etc., in the same position in the service of the State Government without being filled by direct appointment.
Or is appointed by deputation from an equivalent position. However, under the Department of Revenue
Working Officers are largely deputed to other Departments / Corporations / Semi-Governments.
It has been observed that the posts of deputation in offices etc. are frequented. Sadar
As officers continue to serve in other cadres on deputation, various under the Sub-Division of Original Revenue
Cadre posts lying vacant with direct effect available to the general public.
on the services. Also, since such positions are usually in the senior cadre, regular assignments are larger.
It affects the overall functioning of the government by disrupting the scale.

On perusal of the demands received from various departments, some
The office appeared to be demanding the appointment of specific officers.
This leads to some officers going on deputation frequently. In fact, most of their service
The period is spent in the position of deputation. Hence, other officers are on deputation.
There is no opportunity to work. Some officers have been in positions outside the original cadre for a long time.
Working as a deputation, performing the functions of the original post for a very short period of time.
It has been found. From the point of view of uniformity in appointments of deputation
The General Administration Department, vide Reference No. All-inclusive under Government Decisions 2 and 3
Deputation policy has been decided. Strict adherence to this deputation policy and
Guidelines are in order to provide more clarity.
In view of the above facts, the revenue departments are under the administrative control of the
the Inspector General of Revenue, Registration and Stamps and the Commissioner of Deposits and the Director of Land Records.
Gazetted officers of all sub-divisions to move on deputation to posts under other departments.
Comprehensive deputation with a view to streamlining appointments and maintaining administrative discipline.
It has become necessary to issue guidelines in line with the policy.

Revenue, taking into account all the strategic aspects as well as the above-mentioned aspects.

the Board / Corporation in the office under the other Administrative Department on deputation,

Additional Collector (Selected Category) / Additional Collector / Deputy Collector of Revenue Sub-Division

Gazetted Officer: -
1) The aforesaid officers have been posted in the General Administration Department with reference to No. Rulings of 2 and 3
Subject to the terms and conditions of the judgment, deputation shall be for a period of 3 (three) years initially.
You will be able to continue working in the position.
2) Thereafter, at least 3 (three) years of cooling off in the original section by the concerned authorities.
will need to be completed.
